item_name: CASH AND BALANCES DUE FROM DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS
description: Total of 'Cash Items in Process of Collection and Unposted Debits (0020)'; 'Balances Due from Banks in Foreign Countries and Foreign Central Banks (0070)'; 'Currency and Coin (0080)'; 'Balances Due from Depository Institutions in the U.S. (0082)' and 'Balances Due from Federal Reserve Banks (0090)'. For the FR Y-11I (BHCC) and FR Y-11Q (BHCS) reports; excludes balances with closed or liquidating banks or other depository institutions and all loans. Also excludes balances due from subsidiary bank

item_name: GOODWILL (ASSOCIATED WITH THE INVESTMENT IN THE NONBANK SUBSIDIARY(S))
description: Includes the amount of unamortized goodwill associated with the acquisition of the nonbank subsidiary(s). The amount of the goodwill is equivalent to the difference between the original cost of the shares of the nonbank subsidiary(s) and the book value of the bank holding company's proportionate share in the interest in the book value of the equity capital accounts of the nonbank subsidiary(s) on the date of acquisition. The original amount is amortized; expensed (charged-off) over a time period

item_name: NET INCOME FROM SERVICE CORPORATION/SUBSIDIARIES (SEE NOTE BELOW)
description: Includes net income (loss) during the month as a result of the institution's investment in the capital stock obligations (including unsecured loans); or other securities of a service corporation/subsidiary other than a finance subsidiary. Interest income on secured loans to a service corporation/subsidiary should not be reported here but in item 0184. Fees earned for management services furnished to a service corporation/subsidiary should be included on this line. If an institution has an owners

item_name: COMMON AND PREFERRED STOCK INVESTMENT IN SUBSIDIARY BANK HOLDING COMPANIES AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Also includes any other equity elements including the net unrealized holding gains (losses) on available-for-sale securities that are recorded by the subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding companies and reported in Schedule PC; item 5; 'Investments in and receivables due from subsidiaries and associated companies (0365).' Includes: (1) the cost of the reporting bank holding company's holdings of capital stock in subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding

item_name: GOODWILL INVESTMENT IN SUBSIDIARY BANK HOLDING COMPANY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANY
description: Includes the amount of unamortized goodwill associated with the acquisition of subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: OTHER INTANGIBLE INVESTMENTS IN SUBSIDIARY BANK HOLDING COMPANIES AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: The unamortized amount of other specifically identifiable intangible assets related to the acquisition of subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding companies such as core deposit intangibles; favorable leasehold rights that have not been 'pushed down' to the books of the nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies; and organization costs. NOTE: Beginning 3/31/1999; organization costs should not be included in this item but should be expensed as incurred. Reported on

item_name: LOANS; ADVANCES; NOTES; BONDS AND DEBENTURES INVESTMENTS IN ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes all assets that represent extensions of credit to associated bank holding companies and investments in debt instruments issued by associated bank holding companies.

item_name: OTHER RECEIVABLES DUE FROM SUBSIDIARY BANK HOLDING COMPANIES AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes the amount of all other assets that represent claims on subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding companies that cannot be properly reported elsewhere.

item_name: PARENT DIVIDEND INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes the total dividend income paid or payable to the parent from subsidiaries and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: PARENT INTEREST INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes interest income paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company related to cash and balances due from and extensions of credit to subsidiary bank holding companies and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: PARENT MANAGEMENT AND SERVICE FEES FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: The total amount of management and service fees paid or payable to the parent from subsidiaries and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: PARENT OTHER OPERATING INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes all other income paid or payable by subsidiaries and associated bank holding companies to the reporting bank holding company related to transactions with the subsidiaries and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: PARENT TOTAL OPERATING INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: The total amount of income from all sources paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company from subsidiaries and associated bank holding companies.

item_name: SECURITIES PURCHASED UNDER AGREEMENTS TO RESELL
description: Includes the dollar amount of: (1) Security resale agreements that mature in more than one business day; other than securities purchased under resale (reverse repurchase) agreements to maturity; (report resale agreements to maturity as a purchase of the underlying security); and (2) Purchases of participations in pools of securities that mature in more than one business day. Reported are securities purchased under agreements to resell on a gross basis; (i.e.; such transactions are not netted aga

item_name: SECURITIES SOLD UNDER AGREEMENTS TO REPURCHASE
description: Includes the dollar amount of: (1) Security repurchase agreements that mature in more than one business day; other than securities sold under repurchase agreements to maturity (report repurchase agreements to maturity as a sale of the underlying security); and (2) Sales of participations in pools of securities that mature in more than one business day. Reported are securities sold under agreements to repurchase on a gross basis; (i.e.;such transactions are not netted against securities purchased

item_name: LOANS TO U.S. ADDRESSEES
description: The total amount of loans to U.S. addressees. NOTE: Reported on Schedule PC for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 6/30/1997; excludes all holdings of commercial paper; which are reported as securities. Prior to 6/30/86; This item includes loans to non-U.S. addressees (BHCP0363).

item_name: LOANS TO NON-U.S. ADDRESSEES
description: The total amount of loans to non-U.S. addressees. NOTE: Reported on Schedule PC for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 6/30/1997; excludes all holdings of commercial paper; which are reported as securities.

item_name: LOANS; NET OF UNEARNED INCOME
description: The total amount of 'Loans to U.S. Addressees (BHCP0362)'; plus 'Loans to Non-U.S. Addressees (BHCP0363)'; less 'Unearned Income on Loans (BHCP2123)'. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1986 thru current archival file.

item_name: INVESTMENTS AND RECEIVABLES DUE FROM SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED COMPANIES
description: The total amount of the bank holding company's investments in the stock of and receivables due from all subsidiaries; associated companies; and those corporate joint ventures over which the reporting bank holding company exercises significant influence. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: OTHER BORROWED MONEY WITH A REMAINING MATURITY OF MORE THAN ONE YEAR
description: The total amount borrowed with a remaining maturity of more than one year on: Promissory notes; notes and bills re-discounted (including commodity drafts discounted); mortgages; liens; or other encumbrances on premises and fixed assets and on other real estate owned for which the reporting holding company is liable; on loans sold under repurchase agreements that matures in more than one business day; by the creation of due bills representing the bank holding company's receipt of payment and simi

item_name: TOTAL INVESTMENT SECURITIES - BOOK VALUE
description: Includes the amortized cost of all held-to-maturity securities reported in Schedule HC-A; items 0211; 8492; 8531; 8535; 8539 and 8545; column A; and the amortized cost (or historical cost for equity securities) of all available-for-sale securities reported in Schedule HC-A; items 1286; 8494; 8533; 8537; 8541; 8543; 8547 and 8549; column C. In order for this item (column A through column D) to agree with the total amount of held-to-maturity and available-for-sale securities (reported in items 175

item_name: TOTAL INVESTMENT SECURITIES - MARKET VALUE
description: Includes the market value of total investment securities. This is the total of 'U.S. Treasury Securities - Market Value (0401)'; 'U.S. Government Agency and Corporation Obligations - Market Value (0601)'; 'Securities Issued by States and Political Subdivisions in the U.S. (0403)'; 'Other Domestic Securities (Debt and Equity) (0422)' and 'Foreign Securities (Debt and Equity) (0414)'. NOTE: Beginning 3/31/01; for series RCFD and RCON; derived for FDIC. These items will not be available until Inter

item_name: U.S. TREASURY SECURITIES - BOOK VALUE (EXCLUDING TRADING ACCOUNTS)
description: Total book value of all U.S. Treasury securities; e.g.; bills; certificates of indebtedness; notes; and bonds; including those under the Separate Trading of Registered Interest and Principal of Securities (STRIPS) program. Excludes all obligations of U.S. Government Corporations and Agencies. The element of guarantee does not affect classification of securities as between this item and 'U.S. Government Agencies and Corporations (0600).' Excludes all securities held in trading accounts. Also excl

item_name: PLEDGED SECURITIES
description: Includes the amortized cost of all held-to-maturity securities and the fair value of all available-for-sale securities (included in Schedule RC-B for the FFIEC 031-034 reports and in Schedule HC-A (BHCK) for the FR Y-9C report) that are pledged to secure deposits; repurchase transactions; or other borrowings (regardless of the balance of the deposits or other liabilities against which the securities are pledged); as performance bonds under futures or forward contracts; or for any other purpose.

item_name: ALL OTHER OPERATING INCOME
description: Includes all operating income of the reporting bank holding company; exclusive of income from subsidiaries and associated companies reported in items 0508; 0512; 0515; 0518; 0520; 1275; 1276; 1277; 1278; 1279; 0206; 0207; 0208; 0209 and 0210. Any income from cash and balances due from unrelated depository institutions should also be reported. For the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report; includes interest income paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company related to cash and balances due from and ex

item_name: PARENT COMPANY CASH DIVIDEND DECLARED ON COMMON STOCK
description: The amount of cash dividends declared on any outstanding preferred stock during current report period; including dividends not payable until after the end of the report year. Does not include dividends during the previous year but paid in current year.

item_name: SUBSIDIARY BANK LOANS AND ADVANCES TO THE PARENT (SEE NOTE)
description: The total amount of loans and advances to the reporting Bank Holding Company made by subsidiary banks and associated banks and Edge Act and Agreement subsidiaries. Includes the subsidiary's holding of debt instruments issued by the reporting parent. NOTE: This item is reported as confidential. Item name for 'SCMR'; 'SVGC'; and 'SVGS' is: 'Investment in Unconsolidated Subsidiaries' and the definition includes: The total investment in subsidiaries accounted for by the cost or equity methods; net o

item_name: INCOME (LOSS) BEFORE UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME OF SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED COMPANIES
description: Sum of 'Income (Loss) Before Taxes and Undistributed Income (BHCP4250)' plus 'Extraordinary Items (BHCP4320)' minus 'Applicable Income Taxes (BHCP4302)'. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. For the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report; includes 'Income (Loss) Before Taxes and Before Undistributed Income of Subsidiary(s) (4250)' minus 'Applicable Income Taxes/Benefits (4302)'. BHSP0496 on FR 2352 19850630 - 19851231 f

item_name: DIVIDEND INCOME FROM BANK SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes the total dividend income paid or payable to the bank holding company from bank subsidiaries or associated banks. BHSP0508 on FR 2352 19850630 - 19851231 form. There is no data in FDR for any items on FR 2352 for 19850630 - 19851231 time period. Form converted to FR Y-9SP 19860630.

item_name: INTEREST INCOME FROM BANK SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes interest income paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company related to cash and balances due from and extensions of credit to bank subsidiaries and associated banks. Excludes interest from balances due from depository institutions that are not related to the parent bank holding company. Such interest is reported in item 0447.

item_name: MANAGEMENT AND SERVICE FEE INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: The total amount of management and service fees paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company by bank subsidiaries or associated banks.

item_name: PARENT OTHER INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes all other income paid or payable by bank subsidiaries and associated banks to the reporting bank holding company related to transactions with bank subsidiaries and associated banks. NOTE: BHSP0518 on FR 2352 19850630 - 19851231 form. There is no data in FDR for any items on FR 2352 for 19850630 - 19851231 time period. Form converted to FR Y-9SP 19860630. On 19880630 form item was assigned new number BHSP2111.

item_name: PARENT TOTAL OPERATING INCOME FROM SUBSIDIARY AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: The total amount of income from all sources paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company from bank subsidiaries and associated banks.

item_name: ALL OTHER OPERATING EXPENSES
description: Includes all other operating expenses of the reporting bank holding company that cannot properly be reported against 'Salaries and Expenses (BHCP4135)'; 'Interest Expense (BHCP4073)'; 'Provision for Possible Loan Losses (BHCP4230)' and 'Provision for Allocated Transfer Risk (BHCP4243)'. Also includes amortization of intangible assets. For purposes of this item; any interest expense accrued on borrowings reported in items 3605; 3606; and 3607 (reported on Schedule PC); are included. COMPARABILITY

item_name: LOANS; ADVANCES; NOTES; BONDS AND DEBENTURES INVESTMENTS DUE FROM BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes all assets that represents extensions of credit to bank subsidiaries and associated banks and investments in debt instruments issued by bank subsidiaries and associated banks. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: OTHER RECEIVABLES DUE FROM BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes the amount of all other assets that represents claims on subsidiary banks and associated banks that cannot be properly reported elsewhere. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: OTHER INTANGIBLE INVESTMENTS IN NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANKS
description: Includes the unamortized amount of other specifically identifiable intangible assets related to the acquisition of subsidiary nonbanks and associated nonbanks such as CORE deposit intangibles; favorable leasehold rights; and organization costs. NOTE: Beginning 3/31/1999; organization costs should not be included in this item but should be expensed as incurred. Reported on Schedule PC-A for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report.

item_name: LOANS; ADVANCES; BONDS AND DEBENTURES INVESTMENTS IN NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes all assets that represents extensions of credit to nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies and investments in debt instruments issued by nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: OTHER RECEIVABLES DUE FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes the amount of all other assets that represents claims on nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies that cannot be properly reported elsewhere. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: RELATED BANK HOLDING COMPANY ORGANIZATIONS LOANS AND ADVANCES TO THE PARENT
description: The total amount of loans and advances to the reporting bank holding company made by the related bank holding company organizations.

item_name: AMOUNT OF BORROWINGS GUARANTEED BY THE PARENT TO BANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: The total amount of borrowings of subsidiary and associated banks that have been guaranteed by the reporting organization. Includes sales of assets by the subsidiaries where the parent company has indemnified the transfer of the assets; and any other borrowing by the subsidiaries where the parent company would be required to assume any risk in the event the subsidiary failed to pay their obligations.

item_name: AMOUNT OF BORROWINGS GUARANTEED BY THE PARENT TO NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: The total amount of borrowings of nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbanks that have been guaranteed by the reporting organization. (See item 0540.)

item_name: AMOUNT OF BORROWINGS GUARANTEED BY THE PARENT TO RELATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: The total amount of borrowings of related bank holding company organizations that have been guaranteed by the reporting organization. (See item 0540.)

item_name: AMOUNT OF ASSETS SCHEDULED TO MATURE WITHIN ONE YEAR
description: Includes the amount of assets of the parent bank holding company that will be realized in cash; sold or consumed within one year. (This item is equivalent to current assets and includes cash.) Included in this item are the assets that have an original maturity of one year or more if they are scheduled to mature in less than or equal to one year. In addition; included are contractual payments scheduled to be repaid in one year or less; even when the remaining maturity of the asset is more than a

item_name: COMMON AND PREFERRED EQUITY INVESTMENTS IN NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATE NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes: (1) the cost of the reporting bank holding company's holdings of capital stock (including related surplus) in nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies exclusive of any unamortized intangibles (including goodwill) applicable to common stock investments that are reported in items 0087 and 0536; and (2) in the case of common stock investments; the reporting bank holding company's proportional share in their earnings and losses (net of declared or cumulative preferred dividend

item_name: SUBSIDIARY NONBANK LOANS AND ADVANCES TO THE PARENT
description: The total amount of loans and advances to the reporting bank holding company made by subsidiary nonbanks and associated nonbanks and Edge Act and Agreement subsidiaries. Includes the subsidiary's holding of debt instruments issued by the reporting parent. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: PARENT DIVIDEND INCOME FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes the total dividend income paid or payable to the bank holding company from nonbank subsidiaries or associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: PARENT INTEREST INCOME FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes the total interest income paid or payable to the bank holding company related to extensions of credit to nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: PARENT MANAGEMENT AND SERVICE FEE INCOME FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: The total amount of management and service fees paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company by nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: PARENT OTHER OPERATING INCOME FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes all other income paid or payable by nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies to the reporting bank holding company related to transactions with nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: PARENT TOTAL OPERATING INCOME FROM NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: The total amount of income from all sources paid or payable to the reporting bank holding company from nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file.

item_name: OTHER DEBT AND EQUITY SECURITIES
description: Includes all debt securities (not reported in item 0400 or item 6791) and all equity securities held by the parent bank holding company. Excludes all debt and equity investments in subsidiaries and associated companies; which are reported in item 0365. Debt securities designated as available-for-sale should be reported at fair value. Debt securities designated as held-to-maturity should be reported at amortized cost. Includes as debt securities: bonds; notes; and debentures (including equipment

item_name: TOTAL LOANS AND LEASE FINANCE RECEIVABLES: NONACCRUAL
description: Includes the outstanding balances of loans and lease financing receivables that the bank has placed in nonaccrual status. Also includes all restructured loans and lease financing receivables that are in nonaccrual status. Loans and lease financing receivables are to be reported as being in nonaccrual status if: a) they are maintained on a cash basis because of deterioration in the financial position of the borrower; or b) principal or interest has been in default for a period of 90 days or more

item_name: TOTAL LOANS AND LEASE FINANCING RECEIVABLES: PAST DUE 90 DAYS OR MORE AND STILL ACCRUING
description: Includes loans and lease financing receivables on which payment is due and unpaid for 90 days or more. Also includes all restructured loans and leases. (See item 1406). For the 'BHCK' series; includes the sum of loans and lease financing receivables reported in items (BHCK) 1422; 1607; 1597; 1979; 1587; 1227 and 3506. NOTE: For series RCFD; RCFN; and RCON; confidential for the reporting period 12/31/82 thru 3/31/83. Reported on Schedule C for the FR Y-7 (FNBK) report. Reported only by nonbank su

item_name: LOANS AND LEASES RESTRUCTURED AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH MODIFIED TERMS
description: The total amount of all loans and leases that have been restructured and are in compliance with their modified terms. Restructured loans and leases are those loans and leases whose terms have been modified; because of a deterioration in the financial position of the borrower; to provide for a reduction of either interest or principal; regardless of whether such loans and leases are secured or unsecured; regardless of whether such credits are guaranteed by the government or by others; and regardl

item_name: UNEARNED INCOME ON LOANS
description: Includes unearned income only to the extent that it is included in various loan items. For banks that report each loan line net of unearned income; this item will be zero. (Unearned income includes income received but not yet earned; such as prepaid interest and the unamortized portion of loan origination fees.) The amount is reported as an absolute value; and should not be enclosed in parentheses and a minus (-) sign is not to be used. Excludes unearned income on lease financing receivables. NO

item_name: TOTAL LOANS AND LEASES; NET
description: The net total of 'Total Loans and Leases; Net of Unearned Income (2122)' less 'Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses (3123)' and 'Allocated Transfer Risk Reserve (3128)'. For the 'BHCP' series; includes the sum of 'Loans; Net of Unearned Income (0364)' and 'Lease Financing Receivables; Net of Unearned Income (2165)' minus 'Allowance For Loan and Lease Losses (3123)' and 'Allocated Transfer Risk Reserve (3128)'. For the 'FNBK' and 'SUBC' series; 'Total Loans and Leases; Net of Unearned Income (2122

item_name: PREMISES AND FIXED ASSETS (INCLUDING CAPITALIZED LEASES)
description: As of 12/31/2023; ASU 2016-13 'Measurement of Credit Losses on Financial Instruments;' was effective for all institutions. Includes the book value; less accumulated depreciation or amortization; of all premises; equipment; furniture; and fixtures purchased directly or acquired by means of a capital lease. Includes bank premises that are actually owned by the bank and its consolidated subsidiaries and that are entirely or partly occupied (or are to be occupied; if under construction) by the bank

item_name: OTHER ASSETS
description: This item represents bank assets that cannot be properly included in any of the preceding items. For banks on accrual basis; this item includes total accruals of income earned or accrued but not collected; and current accruals of insurance and other prepaid expenses. See notes under 'Accounting Basis' in the 'Instructions for the Preparation of Reports of Condition - F.R. 105a.' For those banks operating branches in foreign countries and in insular possessions and dependencies of the U.S.; the i

item_name: LEASE FINANCING RECEIVABLES (NET OF UNEARNED INCOME)
description: Includes all outstanding receivable balances relating to direction and leveraged financing leases on property acquired by the bank for leasing purposes. These balances include the estimated residual value of leased property and is net of unearned income and any allowance for losses on leases. Any lease which meets the criteria for a capital lease plus certain additional criterion and which was entered into by a lessor bank on an accrual basis of accounting is accounted for as a financing lease.

item_name: TOTAL ASSETS
description: The sum of all asset items. This item must equal 'Total Liabilities; Limited-Life Preferred Stock and Equity Capital (3300)'. FRBS - FASSETS COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/04; reported on (SUIT) Surveillance Intercompany Transactions. Beginning 3/31/04; reported on Schedule HC for the SVGL report. Report total assets. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on the FR Y-9ES (ESOP) report. Report the sum of items C322; C331; C332; C333; C334; C335; C336; C337; C363; C009; and C338. Beginning 12/31/02; report

item_name: TOTAL DEPOSITS
description: Includes the sum of 'Total Transaction Accounts (2215)'; plus 'Nontransaction Savings Deposits (2389)'; plus 'Total Time Deposits (2514))'. Total deposits as defined by the Federal Deposit Insurance Act are: (1) Unpaid balance of money or its equivalent received or held by a bank in the usual course of business and for which it has given or is obligated to give credit; either conditionally or unconditionally; to a commercial; checking; savings; time; or thrift account; or which is evidenced by i

item_name: COMMERCIAL PAPER
description: The total amount outstanding of commercial paper issued by the reporting bank holding company to unrelated parties. (For the BHCQ and BHAS series; by the parent company to unrelated parties.) Commercial paper consists of short-term negotiable promissory notes issued in the United States by commercial businesses; including finance companies and banks. Also commercial paper matures in 270 days or less and is not collateralized. Excludes commercial paper held by related institutions (for the BHCS s

item_name: OTHER BORROWED MONEY WITH A REMAINING MATURITY OF ONE YEAR OR LESS
description: The total amount of money borrowed by the consolidated bank holding company or reporting bank with an remaining maturity of 1 year or less. For purposes of this item; remaining maturity is the amount of time remaining from the report date until the final contractual maturity of a borrowing without regard to the borrowing's repayment schedule; if any. Includes the amount outstanding of all interest-bearing demand notes issued to the U.S. Treasury by consolidated subsidiaries. Also includes the to

item_name: LOANS AND LEASES; NET OF UNEARNED INCOME; ALLOWANCE FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES; AND RESERVE
description: Includes the sum of 'Loans; Net of Unearned Income (BHCK0364)' plus 'Lease Financing Receivables; Net of Unearned Income (BHCK2165)'; minus 'Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses (BHCK3123)' minus 'Allocated Transfer Risk Reserve (BHCK3128)'. NOTE: Duplicate concept as 2125.

item_name: OTHER BORROWINGS WITH A REMAINING MATURITY OF ONE YEAR OR LESS
description: Includes the amount of all other borrowings by the parent company only from unrelated third parties with a remaining maturity of one year or less. Borrowings that finance the acquisition of the bank subsidiary that have a 'scheduled debt retirement' exceeding one year are reported in item 3151 except for the amount due within one year; which should be reported in this item. Also includes overdrafts to cash and due from depository institutions. Short-term borrowing from the subsidiary bank should

item_name: COMBINED THRIFT ASSETS
description: Report the dollar amount of combined assets of federal savings associations; federal saving banks and thrift subsidiaries (including any thrift institution filing the Thrift Financial Report) that are included in the amount reported in line item 15(a) 4778 above. Enter 'zero' if the reporting top-tier bank holding company does not have any thrift assets to report. NOTE: Beginning 06/30/03; reported on Memoranda for the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report. Reported on Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) rep

item_name: COMBINED FOREIGN NONBANK SUBSIDIARY ASSETS
description: Report the dollar amount of combined foreign nonbank subsidiary assets that are included in the amount reported in line item 15(a) 4778 above. Enter 'zero' if the reporting top-tier bank holding company does not have any foreign nonbank subsidiary assets to report. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report. To be completed only by the top-tier bank holding company.

item_name: NUMBER OF NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: Report the number of nonbank subsidiaries that have been included in the total combined nonbank subsidiary assets reported in item 15(a) above. Enter 'zero' if the reporting top-tier bank holding company does not have any nonbank subsidiaries. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report. To be completed only by the top-tier bank holding company.

item_name: NUMBER OF THRIFT SUBSIDIARIES
description: Report the number of federal savings associations; federal savings banks and thrift subsidiaries (including any thrift institutions filing the Thrift Financial Report) that are included in the total combined nonbank subsidiary assets reported in line item 15(b) 2792 above. Enter 'zero' if the reporting top-tier bank holding company does not have any thrift subsidiaries to report. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP(BHCP) report. To be completed only by the top-tier bank holding comp

item_name: NUMBER OF FOREIGN NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: Report the number of foreign nonbank subsidiaries that are included in the total combined nonbank subsidiary assets reported in line item 15(c) 2793 above. Enter 'zero' if the reporting top-tier bank holding company does not have any foreign nonbank subsidiaries to report. To be completed only by the top-tier bank holding company. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP report.

item_name: OTHER LIABILITIES; TOTAL
description: Includes the sum of 'Expenses Accrued and Unpaid (2933)'; 'Net Deferred Income Taxes (3049)'; 'Minority Interest in Consolidated Subsidiaries (3000)' and 'Other Liabilities (2938)'. For those banks operating branches in foreign countries and in insular possessions and dependencies of the U.S.; this item includes net amount 'due to' such branches if the outstanding balance with all foreign branches results in a net 'due to' amount. If the balance results in a net 'due from'; amount is shown in 'O

item_name: ALLOWANCE FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES
description: As of 12/31/2023; ASU 2016-13 'Measurement of Credit Losses on Financial Instruments;' was effective for all institutions. ALLOWANCE FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES Includes the sum of 'Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses - Beginning Balance (3124)'; 'Recoveries in Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses (4605)'; 'Provision for Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses (4230)' and 'Adjustments (4815)' minus 'Charge-Offs in Allowance for Loan and Lease Losses (4635)'. Beginning 3/31/01; for series BHCK; report i

item_name: ALLOCATED TRANSFER RISK RESERVES
description: Section 905 of the International Lending Supervision Act of 1983; enacted November 30 of last year states that each federal banking agency is to require banks under its jurisdiction 'to establish and maintain a special reserve' against claims on foreign borrowers experiencing difficulties servicing their debts because of a lack of foreign exchange. If the reporting bank is required to establish and maintain an allocated transfer risk reserve as specified in Section 905(a) of the International Le

item_name: EQUITY IN UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME(LOSSES) OF NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: The total amount of parent's equity in undistributed income of nonbank subsidiaries and of Edge Act and Agreement subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies less applicable taxes. Includes equity in securities gains or losses; extraordinary items; and cumulative effects of changes in accounting principles of nonbank subsidiaries and associated nonbank companies. For FNBK; report the amount of the parent subsidiary's proportionate interest in the subsidiary's(s') net income (loss) less any div

item_name: BANK HOLDING COMPANY (PARENT COMPANY ONLY) BORROWINGS NOT HELD BY FINANCIAL INSTITUTIONS OR BY INSIDERS (INCLUDING DIRECTORS) AND THEIR INTERESTS
description: NOTE: Beginning 6/30/1997; reported in the DB2 SURH01 table. Reported on Schedule PC-B for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report. Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 6/30/1997; excludes limited-life preferred stock reported in 'Long-Term Borrowings (3151)' for the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report. Beginning 3/31/1997; excludes limited-life preferred stock reported in 'Subordinated Notes And Debentures (4062)' for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report. Includes the amount of al

item_name: LESS:TREASURY STOCK
description: Includes the total carrying value (at cost) of treasury stock as of the report date. (See the Glossary entry for 'treasury stock' for further information). The carrying value is reported as an absolute value and is not enclosed in parentheses or a minus (-) sign is not to be used. NOTE: When the reporting bank holding company has included in item 2333 the ESOP's long-term debt that it has explicitly or implicitly guaranteed; reported in this item is the dollar amount of the offsetting debit to t

item_name: EQUITY IN UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME OF BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: The total amount of parent's equity in undistributed income of bank subsidiaries and of Edge Act and Agreement subsidiaries and associated banks less applicable taxes. Includes equity in securities gains or losses; extraordinary items; and cumulative effects of changes in accounting principles of bank subsidiaries and associated banks. NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. BHSP3156 on FR 2352 19850630 - 1

item_name: GOODWILL
description: Includes the amount (book value) of unamortized goodwill. Represents the excess of the cost of a company over the sum of the fair values of the tangible assets and identifiable intangible assets acquired less the fair value of liabilities assumed in a business combination accounted for as a purchase. The amount of goodwill reported in this item should not be reduced by any negative goodwill. Any negative goodwill arising from a business combination accounted for as a purchase is reported in 'Oth

item_name: MORTGAGE SERVICING ASSETS
description: Includes the carrying value of mortgage servicing assets; i.e.; the unamortized cost of acquiring contracts to service loans secured by real estate (as defined for Schedule RC-C or Schedule HC-B (BHCK); Part 1; item 1 (1410); in the Glossary entry for 'Loans secured by real estate') that have been securitized or are owned by another party; net of any related valuation allowances. Excludes servicing assets resulting from contracts to service financial assets other than loans secured by real estat

item_name: OTHER IDENTIFIABLE INTANGIBLE ASSETS
description: Includes the unamortized amount of other specifically identifiable intangible assets such as purchased credit card relationships; core deposit intangibles; favorable leasehold rights; and organization costs. Also includes servicing assets other than mortgage servicing assets. Prior to 3/31/95; reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11Q (BHCQ) report. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS-M for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. NOTE: Beginning 3/31/01; for series RCFD and RCON;

item_name: TOTAL EQUITY CAPITAL
description: The sum of 'Perpetual Preferred Stock and Related Surplus (3838)'; 'Common Stock (3230)'; 'Surplus (3839)'; 'Undivided Profits and Capital Reserves (3632)'; 'Cumulative Foreign Currency Translation Adjustments (3284)' less 'Net Unrealized Loss on Marketable Equity Securities (0297)'. NOTE: AAAB -- Report the amount of the banking organization's total equity capital as reported in Schedule RC; item 28; of the Call Report (or Schedule HC of the FR Y-9C). Reported on Schedules SFC and C-1 for the C

item_name: COMMON STOCK
description: Includes the aggregate par or stated value of common stock issued. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS for the FR Y-7N (FNBK) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS for the FR Y-11 (BHCS) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedule BS for the FR 2314 (SUBC) report. Beginning March 31; 2000 reported on the Focus report; the title is 'Ownership Equity-Corporation: Common Stock' and is reported on the Statement of Financial Condition. NOTE: Reported on Sched

item_name: GOODWILL INVESTMENT IN BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. The amount of unamortized goodwill associated with the acquisition of subsidiary banks and associated banks. This asset represents the excess of the cost of the bank subsidiaries over the sum of the fair values of the tangible assets and identifiable intangible assets acquired less the fair value of liabilities assumed in a business combination involving a bank and ac

item_name: COMMON AND PREFERRED STOCK INVESTMENTS IN BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes: (1) the cost of the reporting bank holding company's holdings of capital stock (including related surplus) in bank subsidiaries and associated banks exclusive of any unamortized intangibles (including goodwill) applicable to common stock investments that are reported in items 3238 and 4485; and (2) in the case of common stock investments; the reporting bank holding company's proportional share in their earnings and losses (net of declared or cumulative preferred dividends of an investe

item_name: SURPLUS
description: Includes: 1. Amounts paid in excess of par value from the issuance of common stock for cash or nonmonetary assets; and 2. Permanent capital contributions by the stockholders not related to the purchase of stock. Deducted is the cost of treasury stock in excess of par value. However; this line is not to be deducted to a negative amount. Any amount in excess of contributed capital is deducted from item 3250 and reported as a negative amount in item 4697. Amounts reported as paid in excess of par a

item_name: UNDIVIDED PROFITS AND CAPITAL RESERVES (RETAINED EARNINGS)
description: Includes the amount of undivided profits and capital reserves (retained earnings) less any net unrealized loss in the marketable equity securities portfolio and less the carrying value of Treasury stock as of the report date. The amount of the undivided profits and capital reserves (retained earnings) reflects the transfer of net income; declaration of dividends; transfers to surplus; and any other appropriate entries. A net unrealized loss on marketable equity securities is the amount by which

item_name: LIMITED-LIFE PREFERRED STOCK AND RELATED SURPLUS
description: Includes the amount of outstanding limited-life preferred stock including any amounts received in excess of its par or stated value. Also included are its related surplus. NOTE: For series RCFD and RCON; confidential for the reporting period 9/30/83 thru 12/31/83. Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11I (BHCC) report. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 3/31/95; reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11Q (BHCS) report. Prior to 3/31/95; reported for the FR Y-11Q (BHCQ) report. BHSP3282 on FR 235

item_name: PERPETUAL PREFERRED STOCK (INCLUDING RELATED SURPLUS)
description: Includes the aggregate par or stated value of outstanding perpetual preferred stock and its related surplus. Perpetual preferred stock is preferred stock that does not have a stated maturity date or that cannot be redeemed at the option of the holder. Includes those issues of preferred stock that automatically convert into common stock at a stated date. For the FR Y-11Q (BHCS) report; a special-purpose subsidiary should report in this item trust preferred securities such as MIPS and TOPRS. COMPA

item_name: TOTAL EQUITY CONTRACT NOTES; GROSS (SEE NOTE BELOW)
description: Includes the total amount of outstanding debt that obligates the holder to take the common or perpetual preferred stock of the issuer in lieu of cash for repayment of principal and that qualifies as primary or secondary capital proceeds from the issuance of stock dedicated to redeem such notes. This amount should reflect all such qualifying debt regardless of whether the total exceeds the maximum amount of equity contract notes that may be counted as primary capital. (The maximum amount of equit

item_name: TOTAL EQUITY COMMITMENT NOTES; GROSS (SEE NOTE BELOW)
description: For national and state member banks; includes the total amount outstanding debt that is redeemable only with the proceeds from the sale common or perpetual preferred stock and that qualifies as primary capital. Includes only equity commitment notes that were issued by national banks prior to April 15; 1985; and by state member banks prior to May 15; 1985. Later issues of equity commitment notes do not qualify as bank primary capital. State nonmember banks do not have to report this item since eq

item_name: LONG TERM DEBT THAT REPRICES WITHIN ONE YEAR INCLUDED IN ITEMS 2333; 3290; 3293; AND 4062 ON SCHEDULE HC; BALANCE SHEET
description: Includes debt issued by the consolidated bank holding company that has a remaining maturity of more than one year but has a repricing frequency of less than a year. Includes: (1) other borrowed money with a remaining maturity of more than one year (included in item 2333 on Schedule HC (excluding mortgage indebtedness and obligations under capitalized leases which is also reported in item 2333 on Schedule HC)); (2) mandatory convertible securities (included in items 3290 and 3293 on Schedule HC);

item_name: TOTAL LIABILITIES; LIMITED-LIFE PREFERRED STOCK; AND EQUITY CAPITAL
description: Includes the sum of 'Total Liabilities (2948)'; and 'Total Equity Capital (3210)'. Agrees with 'Total Assets (2170).' NOTE: Reported on Schedule SFC for the CUCP report. Reported on Schedule RC-Balance sheet for the FFIEC 031; 032; 033; and 034 reports. For the 'BHAS' series; reported as a derived item. Reported on the Balance Sheet for the FR Y-11I (BHCC) report. Reported in Schedule HC for the FR Y-9C (BHCK) report. For the 'BHCP' series; includes the sum of items 2200; 0279; 2309; 2332; 0368;

item_name: LONG-TERM DEBT REPORTED IN SCHEDULE HC; ITEMS 3290; 3293; AND 4062 ON THE BALANCE SHEET THAT IS SCHEDULED TO MATURE WITHIN ONE YEAR
description: Includes all debt issued by the consolidated bank holding company and reported in 'Equity Contract Notes; Gross (3290)'; 'Equity Commitment Notes; Gross (3293)'; and 'Subordinated Notes and Debentures (4062)' (in Schedule HC) that are scheduled to mature within one year; regardless whether the debt has fixed or floating rates. Included in this item is the amount of such debt issued by the consolidated bank holding company that is redeemable at the option of the holder within one year; even when

item_name: EQUITY IN UNDISTRIBUTED INCOME OF SUBSIDIARY BANK HOLDING COMPANY(S)
description: Includes the amount of the reporting bank holding company's proportionate interest in the subsidiary bank holding company's net income (loss) less the reporting parent bank holding company's proportionate share of any dividends declared by the subsidiary bank holding company. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI for the FR Y-9LP (BHCP) report. Reported on the Income Statement for the FR Y-9SP (BHSP) report. Reported only by those holding companies that are tiered bank holding companies.

item_name: BALANCES DUE FROM RELATED BANKS
description: Includes all cash and balances due from related banks (i.e.; banks directly or indirectly owned by the top-tier parent bank holding company; excluding those directly or indirectly owned by the reporting lower-tier parent bank holding company). Excludes those balances included in item 0365. NOTE: Reported only by lower-tier parent bank holding companies.

item_name: BALANCES DUE FROM RELATED NONBANK COMPANIES
description: Includes all cash and balances due from related nonbank companies (i.e.; nonbank companies directly or indirectly owned by the top-tier parent bank holding company; excluding those directly or indirectly owned by the reporting lower-tier parent bank holding company). Excludes those balances included in item 0365. For purposes of this item; when the reporting holding company is a multi-tier organization; related nonbank companies excludes any related bank holding companies of the respondent and t

item_name: BALANCES DUE FROM RELATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes all balances due from subsidiary bank holding companies; other than those balances included in item 0365. In addition; when a subsidiary bank holding company files this report (FR Y-9LP); all balances due the respondent from its parent bank holding company or from any bank holding company that is directly or indirectly owned or controlled by the top-tier bank holding company are reported. NOTE: Reported only by lower-tiered parent bank holding companies.

item_name: BALANCES DUE TO SUBSIDIARY BANKS
description: Includes all balances due to a bank that is directly or indirectly owned or controlled by the top-tier parent bank holding company. Excludes balances due to related nonbank depository institutions; which are reported in item 3606.

item_name: BALANCES DUE TO NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes all balances due to nonbank subsidiaries that are directly or indirectly owned or controlled by the reporting parent bank holding company. For purposes of this item; when the reporting holding company is a multi-tier organization; nonbank subsidiaries excludes any subsidiary bank holding companies of the respondent and the parent company(s) of the respondent; which are reported in item 3607. When the reporting bank holding company is a top-tier bank holding company; only those transacti

item_name: BALANCES DUE TO RELATED BANK HOLDING COMPANIES
description: Includes all balances due to subsidiary bank holding companies. In addition; when a subsidiary bank holding company files this report (FR Y-9LP); all balances due to the respondent from its parent bank holding company or from any bank holding company that is directly or indirectly owned or controlled by the top-tier bank holding company are reported. NOTE: Reported only by tiered bank holding companies.

item_name: AMOUNT OF LIABILITIES (OTHER THAN BORROWINGS) SCHEDULED TO MATURE WITHIN ONE YEAR
description: Includes the amount of liabilities; other than borrowings included in Schedule PC; items 3290; 3293; 4062; 3605; 3606; and 3607; that is scheduled to mature within one year. Also includes contractual payments scheduled to be repaid in less than or equal to one year; even when the remaining maturity of the liability is over a year and all balances due to related institutions (excluding borrowings from such institutions) that are scheduled to mature in less than or equal to one year. Excludes all

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - PROVISION FOR DEFERRED INCOME TAXES
description: Includes the amount of the provision for deferred income taxes for the parent bank holding company during the reporting period.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - (GAIN) OR LOSS ON SALES OF ASSETS
description: Includes the amount of the (gain) or loss of the sale of assets by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period. A gain on the sale of assets is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign. A loss on the sale of assets is reflected as a positive entry.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - EQUITY IN UNDISTRIBUTED (EARNINGS) LOSSES OF SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of the equity in undistributed (earnings) losses of subsidiaries held by the bank holding company during the reporting period. The amount is reported prior to accounting for equity in extraordinary items of the subsidiaries. Equity in the earnings of subsidiaries is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign. Equity in the losses of subsidiaries is reflected as a positive entry.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - EQUITY IN EXTRAORDINARY ITEMS OF SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of the equity in the extraordinary items of the subsidiaries of the bank holding company during the reporting period. Equity in the extraordinary items of subsidiaries is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign when a gain occurs. Equity in the extraordinary items of subsidiaries is reflected as a positive entry when a loss occurs.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - NET CHANGE IN OTHER LIABILITIES
description: Includes the amount of the net change in the other liabilities of the parent bank holding company. When the net change in liabilities reflects an increase; the entry is reflected as a positive entry. When the net change reflects a decrease in liabilities; the entry is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - NET CHANGE IN OTHER ASSETS
description: Includes the amount of the net change in the other assets of the parent bank holding company. When the net change in assets reflects an increase; the entry is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign. When the net change reflects a decrease in assets; the entry is reflected as a positive entry.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - OTHER; NET
description: Includes the net amount of cash provided or (paid) by the parent bank holding company from operating activities that are not reported in items 3610; 3611; 3612; 3613; 3614; 3615; and 3616. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash provided; the amount is reflected as a positive entry. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash paid; the amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: ADJUSTMENTS TO RECONCILE NET INCOME TO NET CASH PROVIDED BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES - TOTAL ADJUSTMENTS
description: Includes the amount of the total adjustments to net income. The amount is the sum of items 3611; 3612; 3613; 3614; 3615; 3616; and 3617.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM OPERATING ACTIVITIES: NET CASH PROVIDED (USED) BY OPERATING ACTIVITIES
description: Includes the amount of net cash provided (used) by operating activities by the parent bank holding company. This amount is the sum of items 3610 and 3618. For SVHC; report the net increase or decrease in cash and cash equivalents from operating activities for the quarter as would appear in a consolidated statement of cash flows prepared in accordance with SFAS No. 95. Do not include any change in cash and cash equivalents from investing and financing activities. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 3/31/04;

item_name: TOTAL INTEREST AND NONINTEREST INCOME
description: The amount of ordinary and recurring income during the year. NOTE: No longer an item for the FR Y-9C (BHCK) report. Prior to 3/31/94; reported as a derived item on the archival file. For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. Banks with more than $100 million in commercial bank assets are required to itemize 'Income from fiduciary activities' in the quarterly FFIEC Report of Condition and Income ('Call Report') on l

item_name: SUBORDINATED NOTES AND DEBENTURES (INCLUDES LIMITED-LIFE PREFERRED STOCK)
description: Includes the amount outstanding of notes and debentures that are subordinated to the deposits of the subsidiary depository institutions and any other debt that is subordinated. NOTE: Beginning 6/30/1997; reported in the DB2 SURH01 table. For the FR Y-9C (BHCK) report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. Reported in Schedule HC. For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archi

item_name: TOTAL INTEREST EXPENSE
description: Includes the sum of 'Interest on Time Certificates of Deposit of $100;000 or More (4174)'; 'Interest on Other Deposits (4176)'; 'Interest on Deposits in Foreign Offices; Edge and Agreement Subsidiaries; and IBFs (4172)'; 'Expense of Federal Funds Purchased and Securities Sold Under Agreements to Repurchase in Domestic Offices of the Bank and of Its Edge and Agreement Subsidiaries; and in IBFs (4180)'; 'Interest on Demand Notes Issued to the U.S.Treasury and on Other Borrowed Money (4185)'; 'Inte

item_name: GAINS (LOSSES) ON SECURITIES NOT HELD IN TRADING ACCOUNTS
description: Includes the net gain or loss realized during the calendar year to date from the sale; exchange; redemption; or retirement of all securities reportable in Schedule RC; 'Securities (0390)'; (i.e.; securities not held in trading accounts). The gain or loss is the difference between the sales price (excluding interest at the coupon rate accrued since the last interest payment date; if any) and the amortized cost. Also includes (1) net unrealized losses (and subsequent recoveries of such net unreali

item_name: TOTAL INTEREST AND NONINTEREST EXPENSE
description: The amounts of ordinary and recurring expenses of operation during the year. If a bank is on a complete or partial accrual system and regularly charges accrual of interest; taxes (other than income taxes); or other expenses to appropriate expense accounts; amount of expenses thus accrued is reported against the appropriate subitem of this item in the year in which such expenses are incurred; regardless of when payments are actually made. If a bank keeps its expense accounts on a cash basis but f

item_name: SALARIES AND EMPLOYEE BENEFITS
description: Includes salaries and benefits of all officers and employees of the bank and its consolidated subsidiaries including guards and contracted guards; temporary office help; dining room and cafeteria employees; and building department officers and employees (including maintenance personnel). Includes as salaries and employee benefits: (1) Gross salaries; wages; overtime; bonuses; incentive compensation; and extra compensation; (2) Social security taxes and state and federal unemployment taxes paid b

item_name: PROVISION FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES
description: Reported is the amount expensed as the provision for credit losses during the calendar year-to-date. The provision for credit losses includes the amount needed to make the allowance for loan and lease losses; as reported in Schedule RC; item 4.c.; 3123; adequate to absorb expected loan and lease losses; based upon management's evaluation of the loans and leases that the reporting bank has the intent and ability to hold for the foreseeable future or until maturity or payoff. Also report in this i

item_name: PROVISION FOR ALLOCATED TRANSFER RISK RESERVES
description: Includes the amount of the provision for allocated transfer risk. (See item 3128.)

item_name: INCOME BEFORE INCOME TAXES AND SECURITIES GAINS OR LOSSES
description: 'Total Operating Income (4000)' minus 'Total Operating Expense (4130).' NOTE: For the (BHCP) FR Y-9LP report; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. BHSP4250 on FR 2352 19850630 - 19851231 form. There is no data in FDR for any items on FR 2352 for 19850630 - 19851231 time period. Form converted to FR Y-9SP 19860630.

item_name: APPLICABLE INCOME TAXES
description: Includes the total estimated federal; state and local; and foreign income tax expense applicable to 'Income (Loss) Before Income Taxes and Extraordinary Items and Other Adjustments (4301)'; including the tax effects of gains (losses) on securities not held in trading accounts (i.e.; available-for-sale securities and held-to-maturity securities). Includes both the current and deferred portions of these income taxes. (For the 'BHSP' series; the consolidated income tax liability should not be repor

item_name: EXTRAORDINARY ITEMS AND OTHER ADJUSTMENTS; NET OF INCOME TAXES
description: Includes the amount of extraordinary items and other adjustments; net of income taxes. NOTE: Reported on Schedule RI - Income Statement for the FFIEC 031; 032; 033; and 034 reports. For the FR Y-9C (BHCK) and FR Y-9LP (BHCP) reports; the MDRM reflects data starting for the period of June 30; 1981 thru current archival file. COMPARABILITY: Beginning 3/31/03; reported on Notes to the Income Statement - Predecessor Financial Items on the FR Y-9C (BHCK) report. Beginning 12/31/02; reported on Schedu

item_name: ACCUMULATED NET GAINS (LOSSES) ON CASH FLOW HEDGES
description: Includes the effective portion of the accumulated change in fair value (gain or loss) on derivatives designated and qualifying as cash flow hedges in accordance with FASB Statement No. 133; 'Accounting for Derivative Instruments and Hedging Activities.' Under Statement No. 133; a bank that elects to apply hedge accounting must exclude from net income the effective portion of the change in fair value of a derivative designated as a cash flow hedge and record it on the balance sheet in a separate

item_name: NET INCOME (LOSS)
description: Includes the net income (loss) reported in item 4340 (Net Income (Loss)). For most series (other than SVGL) this is a year-to-date value. For the FR Y-11AS (BHAS) report; includes the sum of 'Net Income (3631)' and 'Extraordinary Items; Net of Income Taxes(4320)'. For the 'BHCC' and 'BHCS' series; includes the sum of items 3631; 4320; and 3147 minus item 4302. For the FR 2314a (SUBI) report; includes the sum of 'Income (Loss) Before Extraordinary Items (4300)' and 'Extraordinary Items; Net of Ta

item_name: OTHER INTANGIBLE INVESTMENTS IN BANK SUBSIDIARIES AND ASSOCIATED BANKS
description: Includes the unamortized amount of other specifically identifiable intangible assets related to the acquisition of subsidiary banks and associated banks such as CORE deposit intangibles; favorable leasehold rights; and organization costs.

item_name: RECOVERIES ON ALLOWANCE FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES
description: Includes recoveries of amounts previously charged-off against allowance for loan and lease losses during the calendar year-to-date. Beginning March 2003; for series 'BHCK' report in column B the sum of items 1 through 8. The amount reported in column B must equal part II; item 2; 'Recoveries'. Reported on Schedule HI-B. NOTE: For the Call Report; beginning March 31; 1998; on Schedule RI-B; part I; this item number was unchanged; on Schedule RI-B; part II; the number was changed from 4605 to 2419

item_name: CHARGE-OFFS ON ALLOWANCE FOR LOAN AND LEASE LOSSES
description: The amount of gross charge-offs on loans and leases during the calendar year-to-date. Beginning March 2003; for series 'BHCK' report in column A the sum of items 1 through 8. The amount reported in Column A must equal part II; item 3; 'Charge-offs;' plus II; item 4; 'write-downs arising from transfers of loans to a held-for-sale account. Reported on Schedule HI-B. NOTE: For the CALL Report; beginning June 30; 2001; item number was changed to C079 from 4635; the definition was changed to include

item_name: NONCASH ITEMS INCLUDED IN OPERATING EXPENSE
description: The total amount considered to represent noncash expenditures included in 'Total Operating Expense (BHCP4130)'. Includes depreciation and amortization of intangible assets.

item_name: TOTAL COMBINED NONBANK ASSETS OF NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES
description: Report the dollar amount of the reporting bank holding company's total combined nonbank assets of nonbank subsidiaries. Nonbank assets include the assets of all foreign and domestic nonbank subsidiaries (as defined below) and their majority-owned direct and indirect subsidiaries. The top-tier parent bank holding company should report in this item all assets of nonbank subsidiaries; whether held directly or indirectly or held through lower-tier bank holding companies. item_name: FIRST TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON PARENT COMPANY ONLY FINANCIAL STATEMENTS

It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCP5485.

item_name: SECOND TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON PARENT COMPANY ONLY FINANCIAL STATEMENTS

It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCP5486.

item_name: THIRD TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON PARENT COMPANY ONLY FINANCIAL STATEMENTS
description: The field prefixed by the mnemonic 'TEXT' is the third text of notes of additional information on specific line items on the financial statements that the bank holding company wishes to explain; that has been separately disclosed in the bank holding company's quarterly reports to its shareholders; in its press releases; or on its quarterly reports to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCP5487.

item_name: FOURTH TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON PARENT COMPANY ONLY FINANCIAL STATEMENTS
description: The field prefixed by the mnemonic 'TEXT' is the fourth text of notes of additional information on specific line items on the financial statements that the bank holding company wishes to explain; that has been separately disclosed in the bank holding company's quarterly reports to its shareholders; in its press releases; or on its quarterly reports to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCP5488.

item_name: FIFTH TEXT OF NOTES TO ITEMS ON PARENT COMPANY ONLY FINANCIAL STATEMENTS
description: The field prefixed by the mnemonic 'TEXT' is the fifth text of notes of additional information on specific line items on the financial statements that the bank holding company wishes to explain; that has been separately disclosed in the bank holding company's quarterly reports to its shareholders; in its press releases; or on its quarterly reports to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). It should be used in conjunction with the value reported in BHCP5489.

item_name: CASH AND BALANCES DUE FROM DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS: BALANCES WITH SUBSIDIARY OR AFFILIATED DEPOSITORY INSTITUTIONS
description: Includes all currency and coin; demand; time and savings balances; and other cash items due from; or held with; subsidiary or affiliated depository institutions.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: PURCHASES OF HELD-TO-MATURITY AND AVAILABLE-FOR-SALE SECURITIES
description: Includes the amount of held-to-maturity and available-for-sale securities that were purchased by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period. This amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/94; title was 'Purchases Of Investment Securities'.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: SALES AND MATURITIES OF HELD-TO-MATURITY AND AVAILABLE-FOR-SALE SECURITIES
description: Includes the amount of held-to-maturity and available-for-sale securities that were sold or matured with principal received by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/94; title was 'Sales And Maturities Of Investment Securities'.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: PAYMENTS FOR INVESTMENTS IN AND ADVANCES TO SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of investments in and advances to subsidiaries made by the parent bank holding company to subsidiaries during the reporting period. This amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: SALE OR REPAYMENT OF INVESTMENTS IN AND ADVANCES TO SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of investments in and advances to subsidiaries repaid or redeemed by the subsidiaries to the parent bank holding company during the reporting period.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: OTHER; NET
description: Includes the net amount of cash provided or (paid) by the parent bank holding company from investing transactions that are not properly reflected in items 6552; 6567; 6571; and 6573. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash provided; the amount is reflected as a positive entry. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash paid; the amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM INVESTING ACTIVITIES: NET CASH PROVIDED (USED) BY INVESTING ACTIVITIES
description: Includes the amount of net cash provided (used) by investing activities by the parent bank holding company. The amount of net cash provided is recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign. This amount is the sum of items 6567; 6573; and 6588 minus items 6552 and 6571.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PROCEEDS FROM PURCHASED FUNDS AND OTHER SHORT-TERM BORROWINGS
description: Includes the amount of proceeds received by the parent bank holding company from the issuance of obligations that have a remaining maturity of one year or less during the reporting period. This includes: investment securities sold under agreements to repurchase; commercial paper; program notes; and master notes; and other borrowings with a remaining maturity of one year or less. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A; Part II for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/96; included obligation

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: REPAYMENTS OF PURCHASED FUNDS AND OTHER SHORT-TERM BORROWINGS
description: Includes the amount of repayments made by the parent bank holding company on obligations that have a remaining maturity of one year or less during the reporting period. This includes: investment securities sold under agreements to repurchase; commercial paper; program notes; and master notes; and other borrowings with a remaining maturity of one year or less. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A; Part II for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/96; included obligations with an original m

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PROCEEDS FROM ADVANCES FROM SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of proceeds from advances or loans from subsidiaries to the parent bank holding company during the reporting period.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: REPAYMENT OF ADVANCES FROM SUBSIDIARIES
description: Includes the amount of repayments made by the parent bank holding company on advances or loans from subsidiaries during the reporting period. This amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PROCEEDS FROM ISSUANCE OF LONG-TERM DEBT
description: Includes the amount of proceeds received by the parent bank holding company from the issuance of obligations that have a remaining maturity of more than one year during the reporting period. This includes: other borrowed funds; mandatory convertible securities; subordinated notes and debentures; and limited-life preferred stock. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A; Part II for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/96; included obligations with an original maturity.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: REPAYMENT OF LONG-TERM DEBT
description: Includes the amount of repayments made by the parent bank holding company on obligations that have a remaining maturity of more than one year during the reporting period. This includes: other borrowed funds; mandatory convertible securities; subordinated notes and debentures; and limited-life preferred stock. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A; Part II for the FR Y-9LP report. COMPARABILITY: Prior to 3/31/96; included obligations with an original maturity.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PROCEEDS FROM ISSUANCE OF COMMON STOCK
description: Includes the amount of the proceeds from the issuance of common stock by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period. The amount reported should include any amounts associated with the issuance of common stock that are carried in the surplus account.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PROCEEDS FROM ISSUANCE OF PREFERRED STOCK
description: Includes the amount of the proceeds from the issuance of preferred stock by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period. The amount reported should include any amounts associated with the issuance of preferred stock that are carried in the surplus account. Amounts associated with the issuance of limited-life preferred stock are reported in items 6600 and 6604.

item_name: CONFIDENTIAL DATA INDICATOR
description: A one-digit code indicating confidentiality status of reported data. Code: Null = Used when items 6669; 3452; 3451; 6927; 6928; and 6929 = 1; 2; 3; or 4 for the 'BHCK' series; when item 6669 = 1; 2; 3; or 4 for he 'BHCC' and 'BHCS' series; and when items 8679; 8684; 8685; and 8686 = 1; 2; 3; or 4 for the 'FNBK' series. There are no null values reported for the 'BHAS'; 'BHCP'; and 'BHSP' series. 1 = Public - by virtue of no request for confidentiality 2 = Confidential - by virtue of a pending req

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: PAYMENT TO REPURCHASE PREFERRED STOCK
description: Includes the amount of the payments made by the parent bank holding company during the reporting period to repurchase or redeem preferred stock. Payments made to repurchase or redeem limited-life preferred stock are reported in item 6743. This amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: DIVIDENDS PAID
description: Includes the amount of dividends paid on common and preferred stock by the parent bank holding company. Dividends associated with limited-life preferred stock are reported in item 6743. This amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: OTHER; NET
description: Includes the net amount of cash provided (used) by financing transactions that are not included in items 6590; 6591; 6592; 6596; 6600; 6604; 6607; 6619; 6741 and 6742. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash provided; the amount is reflected as a positive entry. When the 'net; other' reflects net cash paid; the amount is reflected as a negative entry and recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus ( - ) sign.

item_name: CASH FLOWS FROM FINANCING ACTIVITIES: NET CASH PROVIDED (USED) BY FINANCING ACTIVITIES
description: Includes the amount of net cash provided (used) by financing activities by the parent bank holding company. The amount of net cash used is recorded in parentheses rather than with a minus (-) sign. This amount includes the sum of items 6590; 6592; 6600; 6607; 6619; and 6743 minus items 6591; 6596; 6604; 8518; 6741; and 6742. NOTE: Reported in Schedule PI-A for the FR Y-9LP report.

item_name: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS: NET INCREASE (DECREASE) IN CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS
description: Includes the amount of the net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents. This amount includes the sum of items 3619; 6589; and 6744.

item_name: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS: BEGINNING OF YEAR
description: Includes the amount of cash and cash equivalents held at the beginning of the year. For the purpose of reporting; cash includes not only currency on hand but demand deposits with financial institutions. Cash also includes other kinds of accounts that have the general characteristics of demand deposits in that the customer may deposit additional funds at any time and also effectively may withdraw funds at any time without prior notice or penalty. Cash equivalents are short-term; highly liquid inv

item_name: CASH AND CASH EQUIVALENTS: CURRENT YEAR-TO-DATE
description: Includes the amount of cash and cash equivalents; current year-to-date. This amount includes the sum of items 6758 and 6773.

item_name: SECURITIES OF U.S. GOVERNMENT AGENCIES AND CORPORATIONS AND SECURITIES ISSUED BY STATES AND POLITICAL SUBDIVISIONS
description: Includes the appropriate value (i.e.; fair value or amortized cost) of all securities of U.S. Government agencies and corporations (including U.S. Government-sponsored agencies); other than the U.S. Treasury. Also includes all securities issued by states and political subdivisions in the U.S. States and political subdivisions in the U.S. includes: (1) the fifty states of the United States and the District of Columbia and their counties; municipalities; school districts; irrigation districts; and

item_name: BALANCES HELD BY SUBSIDIARY BANKS OF THE BANK HOLDING COMPANY DUE TO NONBANK SUBSIDIARIES OF THE BANK HOLDING COMPANY

Nonbank operating revenue includes the operating revenue of all foreign and domestic non-bank subsidiaries and their majority-owned direct and indirect subsidiaries. Operating revenue is defined as the sum of total interest income and total noninterest income (before deduction of expenses and extraordinary items).
